reasons: The motion defines a reusable Agent Assets Library with clear taxonomy, role cards, templates, and checklists for future agent work.
The assets are explicitly tied back to workflow-role canon and docs-ops canon while stating that they do not grant authority or replace settled policy.
No Level 3 through Level 5 activation, no docs-nexus or jai-nexus edits, and no automation, scheduler, API, DB, provider, credential, or execution changes were introduced.
